concerns.text: T015 ('Integrate novel object generation') and T007 ('Create NovelObjectSet generator') do not explicitly include a task to EXECUTE the generator to produce the 30 required geometry files in `data/generated/`. FR-003 and US-1 require the existence of these 30 novel objects for the t-test (FR-005). Without a specific task to run the generator and persist the artifacts, the acceptance criterion for FR-003 is not satisfied, creating a silent relaxation of the requirement.

T029 ('Run full end-to-end benchmark') lacks an explicit verification step to assert that wall-clock time ≤ 6h and peak memory ≤ 7GB. SC-003 and SC-004 define these as measurable outcomes that must be verified against thresholds. A task that only 'logs' metrics without asserting them against the Success Criteria constitutes a weakening of the constraint, as it allows the pipeline to pass even if the resource limits are violated.

T008 ('Configure random seed fixation') references 'Constitution Principles I & II' but does not explicitly include the implementation of the `validate_citations.py` script or the checksumming logic required by Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) and Principle II (Verified Accuracy). The plan explicitly lists `validate_citations.py` as a required file. Omitting the task to implement this verification gate weakens the constitutional constraint of 'Verified Accuracy'.
